Code fragment: return dslContext.selectFrom(table)
Explanation: Using `selectFrom(table)` fetches all columns from the table, which can retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider explicitly selecting only the required columns using `select(field1, field2, ...).from(table)`.
